chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-658 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.2718/2023 2. For hearing of main case 11-10-2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed, hence he does not press this petition. Accordingly, instant petitioner is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
